name: Claude Sync

releases.author: GBAnjos
releases.description:
## Claude Sync for Obsidian

Initial release - automatically imports Claude chat exports from a watched folder into your vault.

### Features
- Auto-import markdown files from configured watch folder
- Preserve subdirectory structure during import
- Configurable watch folder, vault destination, and check interval
- Manual sync command and ribbon icon
- Delete after import option
- Notification support

### Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below
2. Create folder: `YourVault/.obsidian/plugins/claude-sync/`
3. Copy the files into that folder
4. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins

Works with the [Claude to Obsidian](https://github.com/GBAnjos/claude-to-obsidian) Chrome extension.
